The provided sequence is a 48-nucleotide DNA sequence with an equal distribution of all four bases.

### Sequence Analysis
The sequence consists of a single DNA record with a total length of 48 nucleotides [tool:sequence_stats]. The nucleotide composition is perfectly balanced, with 12 occurrences each of Adenine (A), Cytosine (C), Guanine (G), and Thymine (T), resulting in a GC content of 50.0% [tool:sequence_stats]. 

The reverse complement of the sequence is "ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT" [tool:sequence_stats]. When translated, the sequence yields a peptide with a length of 16 amino acids, with a preview of "TYVRTYVRTYVRTYVR" [tool:sequence_stats].
